steps.title: Identify the contrast signal
steps.content: The passage specifies the actual effect: wearying audiences instead of energizing them. This phrase reveals what the playwrights hoped for—to energize rather than weary.

steps.title: Select the word for excitement and energy
steps.content: Rousing means exciting and energizing. Multifaceted, realistic, and subtle don't convey excitement or energy. That matches choice C — C is correct.
